headline: A Look At Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Valuation After Law Firm Investigation And Q1 2026 Slowdown
summary: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) is back in focus after a law firm launched an investigation linked to the company’s disclosure of weaker organic revenue growth and margin deterioration in Q1 2026. See our latest analysis for Willis Towers Watson. At a share price of $257.40, WTW has seen its 30 day share price return fall 10.54% and its year to date share price return fall 21.11%. The 3 year total shareholder return of 20.97% contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 15.72%. This...
